steps.title: Link to the prior claim
steps.content: The sentence before the underlined one says younger musicians have embraced the experimentation of Keyboard Fantasies. The underlined sentence names Kelela, Jamila Woods, and other contemporary artists who cite the album as an influence.

steps.title: Reject different functions
steps.content: Choice A wrongly says the sentence urges musicians to adopt the album's sound. Choice B invents criticism by younger musicians. Choice D invents a contrast between the album and the recordings of the named musicians. The answer is C.
